arts.ttl: €25m move to Tottenham floated but Barcelona believe they have control of player
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Barcelona are in the picture to sign Rayo Vallecano’s Andrei Rati. The right-back moved to the La Liga side in August 2023 and his game time [628 minutes in the league] was restricted last season. He’s enjoyed regular minutes this season and his performances haven’t gone unnoticed. arts.ttl: Club appear to be counting on Tottenham buying their player – Transfer funds already being allocated
arts.sum: Timo Werner spent the second half of last season on loan at Tottenham Hotspur, scoring two goals and registering three assists from 13 league games. Back in May, Tottenham extended the 28-year-old’s loan stay until the end of this season, with an option to buy. arts.ttl: Referee Davide Massa to be miss one game after errors in Napoli-Roma game
arts.sum: Davide Massa, the referee who officiated the recent Napoli-Roma match, is expected to sit out the next Serie A round. Following his performance at the Stadio Diego Armando Maradona, where he failed to issue two yellow cards, Gazzetta dello Sport report that Massa will take on a role as either a VAR official or a fourth official. This decision appears to be more of a routine rotation rather than a punitive measure, although such mistakes typically lead to reassignment. The controversy centers around two incidents during the match. arts.ttl: “I don’t know yet” – Premier League player quizzed on Tottenham or Liverpool move
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Liverpool are said to have shown interest in AFC Bournemouth’s Illya Zabarnyi. This was reported in the English press, after the defender enjoyed regular game time and impressed at Bournemouth this season. arts.ttl: Today in Serie A: November 27, 1994 – Mazzone’s Roma Derby Masterpiece
arts.sum: Ahead of the Derby della Capitale scheduled on November 27, 1994, odds looked much in favor of Lazio. But Roma were trained by the unforgettable Carlo Mazzone, who was a fine psychologist. Mazzone used some pre-match denigratory comments appearing on press to charge his boys up and lead them to a crushing, unexpected win. arts.ttl: Potential Guglielmo Vicario transfer replacement sends clear demand to help Tottenham through crisis
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are going to have to explore all options now that they prepare for a time without unavailable first-choice goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario. Taking on AS Roma tomorrow - five days after travelling to Manchester - leaves Ange Postecoglou with the likely option of promoting 36-year-old Fraser Forster for the time being.

arts.ttl: Record-breaking Tottenham ace being courted by Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have long been linked with a move for Liverpool ace, Trent Alexander-Arnold, however, they could be turning their attentions elsewhere.
